title: 1 step DFU - Content of Software Update tab with available update for Earbuds and Charge Case on FW 5038
scenario: Verify that only the Earbuds update is shown in the Software Update tab when an update is available for Earbuds and the Charge Case is on FW 5038 (which does not support 1-step DFU).
steps: Start the app with Osprey EB on a lower version (has update) and CC on version 5038.
Go to Device Settings > Software Update.
expected: Only Earbuds update is shown, since Charge Case on 5038 does not support 1-step DFU. Note: When device is on version 5038, a case toast appears with the same pattern as Tern (after app restart, for a specific number of times, and after earbuds DFU).
